body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/import/organization 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/import/organization 
 ## 接口描述 
支持外部系统通过接口导入预算组织信息进入费控，支持新增和更新（以组织id为唯一值进行更新），支持导入或条件，不支持部分成功 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"organizations","required":true,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81100%E6%9D%A1","maxLength":"100"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"adminUsers","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E8%B4%9F%E8%B4%A3%E4%BA%BA","exampleValue":"001%2C002","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87ID","exampleValue":"orgId","desc":"%20%E4%B8%8D%E5%A1%AB%E4%BC%9A%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E7%94%9F%E6%88%90%0A%E4%BB%85%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%E5%92%8C%E5%AD%97%E6%AF%8D%0A%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E7%9A%84%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87id%E4%B8%8E%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E5%86%85%E7%9A%84%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87id%E4%B8%80%E8%87%B4%EF%BC%8C%E5%B0%86%E6%8C%89%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E5%AF%B9%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E8%BF%9B%E8%A1%8C%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetName","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"api%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%956","desc":"","maxLength":"120"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetOrgTypeId","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BBID","exampleValue":"BGTTYP20241129084711","desc":"%20%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E5%B7%B2%E6%9C%89%E7%9A%84%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BBid","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetOrgTypeName","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB","desc":"%20%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E5%B7%B2%E6%9C%89%E7%9A%84%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetParentId","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%8A%E7%BA%A7%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87ID","exampleValue":"424124","desc":"%20%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E4%BC%A0%E4%BA%86%E5%80%BC%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%99%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E4%B8%BA%E8%AF%A5%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E4%B8%8B%E7%BA%A7%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%0A%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E6%B2%A1%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%99%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E4%B8%BA%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%80%E7%BA%A7","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"priority","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E4%BC%98%E5%85%88%E7%BA%A7","exampleValue":"99","desc":"%20%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%811-99%E7%9A%84%E6%95%B4%E6%95%B0","maxLength":"2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"reportUsers","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%8A%A5%E8%A1%A8%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E4%BA%BA","exampleValue":"003%2C004","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"conditions","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%201%E3%80%81%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E5%85%A8%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%B3%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E3%80%81%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E3%80%81%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E7%AD%89%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E9%A1%B9%EF%BC%8C%E5%BF%85%E9%A1%BB%E6%9C%89%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E6%9C%89%E5%80%BC%0A2%E3%80%81list%E5%AD%98%E5%9C%A8%E5%A4%9A%E4%B8%AA%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6%E4%B9%8B%E9%97%B4%E4%B8%BA%E6%88%96%E5%85%B3%E7%B3%BB"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectTypes","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"PRJTYPe20210%2CPRJTYPE2024","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projects","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE","exampleValue":"PRJ1%2CPRJ2","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"costCenters","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E6%88%90%E6%9C%AC%E4%B8%AD%E5%BF%83","exampleValue":"CENTER1%2CCENTER2","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E6%88%90%E6%9C%AC%E4%B8%AD%E5%BF%83%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depWithChildren","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%EF%BC%88%E5%90%AB%E4%B8%8B%E7%BA%A7%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%EF%BC%89","exampleValue":"00000001234%2C00000002","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"departments","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8","exampleValue":"00000001234%2C00000002","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"matterTypeName","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB","exampleValue":"%E5%A4%A9%E8%93%9D1%2C%E5%A4%A9%E8%93%9D2","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"matterMissionName","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E4%BA%8B%E9%A1%B9","exampleValue":"%E5%A4%A9%E8%93%9D11%2C%E5%A4%A9%E8%93%9D22","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"matterDetailName","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E4%BA%8B%E7%94%B1","exampleValue":"%E5%A4%A9%E8%93%9D111%2C%E5%A4%A9%E8%93%9D222","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"persons","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E4%B8%AA%E4%BA%BA","exampleValue":"003%2C004","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}}],"open":false}]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"opsEmpNumber","required":true,"label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E4%BA%BA","exampleValue":"001","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"false","desc":"%20true%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0Afalse%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"errors","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%8C%E8%BF%99%E9%87%8C%E4%BC%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E5%85%B7%E4%BD%93%E7%9A%84%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%0A%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E6%98%AF%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%99%E4%B8%BA%E8%BF%99%E9%87%8C%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"index","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%BA%8F%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"1","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetOrgError","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0","exampleValue":"%E6%A0%A1%E9%AA%8C%E7%AC%AC1%E8%A1%8C%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9A%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E4%B8%8A%E7%BA%A7%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E4%B8%8D%E5%AD%98%E5%9C%A8%EF%BC%9B%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E4%B8%8D%E5%AD%98%E5%9C%A8","desc":"%20%E5%85%B7%E4%BD%93%E7%9A%84%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0"}}]}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0Afalse%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable>

### 响应报文
### 接口调用失败的报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例
```json
{
    "success": false,
    "message": "预算组织的承担条件不可为空，请修改后重试"
}
```
### 导入成功的报文
```json
{
    "data": {
        "success": true,
        "errors": []
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}
```
### 导入失败的报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例
```json
{
    "data": {
        "success": false,
        "errors": [
            {
                "index": 1,
                "budgetOrgError": "校验第1行预算组织失败：预算组织所属上级编码不存在；预算组织承担项目不存在"
            },
            {
                "index": 2,
                "budgetOrgError": "校验第2行预算组织失败：预算组织所属上级编码不存在；预算组织承担项目不存在"
            }
        ]
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
外层success为接口调用状态 true为成功 其余都是失败
data内的sucess为实际导入成功状态， true为成功 其余都是失败
常见报错如下：
未设置预算组织名称，不予上传
预算组织编号仅支持数字和字母，且长度不可超过50位
预算组织名称长度不可超过120位
预算组织名称不可为'其他'
优先级必须为1-99的整数
预算组织编码重复
预算组织所属分类的编码和名称不一致
预算组织所属上级编码不存在
预算组织所属分类必须与所属上级的分类保持一致
xx（表示承担元素）存在重复值
xx（表示承担元素）不存在
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/import/organization

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/import/organization

接口描述

支持外部系统通过接口导入预算组织信息进入费控，支持新增和更新（以组织id为唯一值进行更新），支持导入或条件，不支持部分成功

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"organizations","required":true,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81100%E6%9D%A1","maxLength":"100"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"adminUsers","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E8%B4%9F%E8%B4%A3%E4%BA%BA","exampleValue":"001%2C002","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87ID","exampleValue":"orgId","desc":"%20%E4%B8%8D%E5%A1%AB%E4%BC%9A%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E7%94%9F%E6%88%90%0A%E4%BB%85%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%E5%92%8C%E5%AD%97%E6%AF%8D%0A%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E7%9A%84%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87id%E4%B8%8E%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E5%86%85%E7%9A%84%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87id%E4%B8%80%E8%87%B4%EF%BC%8C%E5%B0%86%E6%8C%89%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E5%AF%B9%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E8%BF%9B%E8%A1%8C%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetName","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"api%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%956","desc":"","maxLength":"120"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetOrgTypeId","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BBID","exampleValue":"BGTTYP20241129084711","desc":"%20%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E5%B7%B2%E6%9C%89%E7%9A%84%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BBid","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetOrgTypeName","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB","desc":"%20%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E5%B7%B2%E6%9C%89%E7%9A%84%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetParentId","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%8A%E7%BA%A7%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87ID","exampleValue":"424124","desc":"%20%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E4%BC%A0%E4%BA%86%E5%80%BC%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%99%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E4%B8%BA%E8%AF%A5%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E4%B8%8B%E7%BA%A7%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%0A%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E6%B2%A1%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%99%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E4%B8%BA%E7%AC%AC%E4%B8%80%E7%BA%A7","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"priority","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E4%BC%98%E5%85%88%E7%BA%A7","exampleValue":"99","desc":"%20%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%811-99%E7%9A%84%E6%95%B4%E6%95%B0","maxLength":"2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"reportUsers","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%8A%A5%E8%A1%A8%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E4%BA%BA","exampleValue":"003%2C004","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"conditions","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%201%E3%80%81%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E5%85%A8%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%B3%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E3%80%81%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E3%80%81%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E7%AD%89%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E9%A1%B9%EF%BC%8C%E5%BF%85%E9%A1%BB%E6%9C%89%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E6%9C%89%E5%80%BC%0A2%E3%80%81list%E5%AD%98%E5%9C%A8%E5%A4%9A%E4%B8%AA%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6%E4%B9%8B%E9%97%B4%E4%B8%BA%E6%88%96%E5%85%B3%E7%B3%BB"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectTypes","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"PRJTYPe20210%2CPRJTYPE2024","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projects","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE","exampleValue":"PRJ1%2CPRJ2","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"costCenters","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E6%88%90%E6%9C%AC%E4%B8%AD%E5%BF%83","exampleValue":"CENTER1%2CCENTER2","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E6%88%90%E6%9C%AC%E4%B8%AD%E5%BF%83%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depWithChildren","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%EF%BC%88%E5%90%AB%E4%B8%8B%E7%BA%A7%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%EF%BC%89","exampleValue":"00000001234%2C00000002","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"departments","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8","exampleValue":"00000001234%2C00000002","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"matterTypeName","required":false,"label":"%E6%89%BF%E6%8B%85%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E5%88%86 :{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0Afalse%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}}]}]}

响应报文

接口调用失败的报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "预算组织的承担条件不可为空，请修改后重试"
}

导入成功的报文

{
    "data": {
        "success": true,
        "errors": []
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}

导入失败的报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例

{
    "data": {
        "success": false,
        "errors": [
            {
                "index": 1,
                "budgetOrgError": "校验第1行预算组织失败：预算组织所属上级编码不存在；预算组织承担项目不存在"
            },
            {
                "index": 2,
                "budgetOrgError": "校验第2行预算组织失败：预算组织所属上级编码不存在；预算组织承担项目不存在"
            }
        ]
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}

错误码说明

外层success为接口调用状态 true为成功 其余都是失败 data内的sucess为实际导入成功状态， true为成功 其余都是失败 常见报错如下： 未设置预算组织名称，不予上传 预算组织编号仅支持数字和字母，且长度不可超过50位 预算组织名称长度不可超过120位 预算组织名称不可为’其他’ 优先级必须为1-99的整数 预算组织编码重复 预算组织所属分类的编码和名称不一致 预算组织所属上级编码不存在 预算组织所属分类必须与所属上级的分类保持一致 xx（表示承担元素）存在重复值 xx（表示承担元素）不存在
